message:
test: CI gate integrity assertions, VOI/mean-field formatting, S3-FIFO capacity clamping

- ci_full_suite_gate.rs: add phase1_matrix_regression_guard_reason_set_exact
  and expected_regression_guard_reason_set assertions to evidence contract
- extension_scoring_voi_meanfield.rs: reformat multiline assertions across
  6 test functions for clippy compliance (no logic changes)
- hostcall_s3_fifo_policy.rs: new test
  config_clamps_small_capacity_equal_to_live_capacity_down_by_one()
  validating S3FifoPolicy capacity clamping behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
